member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.DieExecutor
member.summary: Executes the logic related to each of the Pins.

member.summary: Gets or Sets MbistResultExitPort.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.DieExecutor.GetNewStatus(Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.MbistResultExitPort,Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.MbistResultExitPort)
member.summary: Compares the flow MbistResultExitPort flag and returns the one with higher priority.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.MbistResultExitPort
member.summary: CTV processing status.

member.summary: Mbist fails.

member.summary: The pin doesnt have any fails.

member.summary: Error.

member.summary: UndetermineResult.

member.summary: SetBisrResultDataDefaultValue.

member.summary: FailedBisrCompression.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod
member.summary: Mbist test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.dies
member.summary: Stores Hry/bisrChain info per pin (future SSN support). Key = pin name / Value = DieDecoder.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.Mbist.IMbistFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with unit testing purposes.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.EnabledStates
member.summary: Enabled States.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.EnabledStates.Disabled
member.summary: Disabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.EnabledStates.Enabled
member.summary: Collect recoverable IPs.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets the Symbol of the levels file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

summary.para: Gets or sets FailCaptureCount. Setting this parameter to 1 will set stop-on-first-fail. Any value greater than 1 will run full plist unless used in combination with ReturnOn plist options.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.PrintToItuff
member.summary: Gets or sets which values should be printed to the ituff. Possible values are: 'hry' and 'bisrcompfail'.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.RecoveryModeDownbin
member.summary: Gets or sets set the recovery mode of the instance's MbistTestMode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.BisrMode
member.summary: Gets or sets mode used to store BISR data in TP. Possible values are 'compress', 'patmod', 'birabuild' and 'uncompress'.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.DffOperation
member.summary: Gets or sets the dff operation modes.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.DffSocket
member.summary: Gets or sets dff socket.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.MappingConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets Mapping Configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.VfdmConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets Vfdm Configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.ClearVariables
member.summary: Gets or sets mode for clearing or not global Hry string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.MbistTestMode
member.summary: Gets or sets enables default or post repair flows.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.ItuffNameExtenstion
member.summary: Gets or sets the Ituff name extension which is added to the hry tag when printing to the ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.LookupTableConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets LookupTableConfigurationFile.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.RecoveryConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets RecoveryConfigurationFile.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.IgnoreResetFail
member.summary: Gets or sets to ignore reset fail.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Mbist.PrimeMbistTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper.
